title: The Road to the Rooftop Opens
description: On pages 8–11, this part focuses on Marco, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, King, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as The raid reaches its decisive stage as the Tobiroppo are revealed, Yamato remembers Ace, and the Worst Generation reaches the rooftop to face Kaido and Big Mom.
scene: The raid reaches its decisive stage as the Tobiroppo are revealed, Yamato remembers Ace, and the Worst Generation reaches the rooftop to face Kaido and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Marco
dialogue.text: Stop Marco!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why are you letting him run circles around you!!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: But he just saved us, right...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Would you rather get killed by Master Queen instead!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Get him!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Right now, I have no reason to go after Kaido directly.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nico Robin!! Bone man!! Run up the Castle!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Under- stood!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Glad to take you up on that!!

dialogue.speaker: Marco
dialogue.text: WE'VE GOT HIM!!! "MARCO THE PHOENIX!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Wha-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Are you ready?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I'm counting on you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Whoa!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You fools!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's taking one of the strawberries with him!!

dialogue.speaker: King
dialogue.text: Now that's what I'm talking about!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I'm begging you, pops!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: And I'm telling you NO! You fool!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ace, I'm sure I've told you this many times already...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: About who it was that previously held the seat of the 2ND DIVIS/ON COMMANDER, which you now hold.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And why it had been retired for so long....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We only found out about Lord Oden's death...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Several years after the incident had happened.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've thought about marching into Wano Country countless times, however...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Think about the countless amount of casualties it would cause if we did that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Then let me go by myself!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I made a promise!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Someone knows

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A man that even Kozukii Oden couldn't take down!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Whoa!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You think you can beat him!!? Don't be so full of yourself, ace!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: ZEHAHAHAHAHAHA!! But seriously, open was really strong!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: captain ace, you really just want to take down a BIG SHOT, don't you!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Shut up teach!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ACE ISN'T DOING THIS JUST TO ACQUIRE FAME!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Some people

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn it.... If I don't get stronger, I won't be able to fulfil my promise...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that just goes to show how heavy the cross you are carrying is...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ace, if pops ever gives the go ahead...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Make sure you take ME along with you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Same here. We're counting on you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you guys come along, I think we could beat him now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Really!? Just how naive are you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Hehe...

dialogue.speaker: Marco
dialogue.text: MarcO!!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - The Worst Generation Reaches the Roof storyline with 46 dialogue beats. The raid reaches its decisive stage as the Tobiroppo are revealed, Yamato remembers Ace, and the Worst Generation reaches the rooftop to face Kaido and Big Mom.
